parameters-en.Drive: Adjusts the amount of signal boost. At higher values, distortion can be heard.
parameters-en.Bass: Boosts or attenuates low frequencies. 5.0 is normal.
parameters-en.Comp: Adjusts the amount of compression. Helps "push" the front end of non-master volume tube amps to achieve a cranked sound at bedroom volume.
parameters-en.Treble: Boosts or attenuates high frequencies. 5.0 is normal.
parameters-en.Output: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
